series_metadata.series_description: A file that contains documentation regarding an incarcerated person's visitors and visiting record.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: This file will be merged with the incarcerated person master file upon incarcerated person's release from custody. Retain for ten (10) years after final release, maximum expiration, death, definite expiration, etc., then destroy ; Electronic: This file will be merged with the incarcerated person master file upon incarcerated person's release from custody. Retain for ten (10) years after final release, maximum expiration, death, definite expiration, etc., then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
